sigWerErrors.reason: The insertion of 'sıfır' (zero) at this position changes the structure of the phone number, potentially confusing the country code and the rest of the number.
'artı' (plus) is used for international dialing codes, while 'nokta' (dot/point) is not relevant in this context and changes the meaning significantly.
The insertion of 'nokta' (dot/point) in a phone number context is confusing and could lead to misinterpretation of the number.
